CreateVolumeCluster.zoneName: Availability zone; defaults to empty, selected automatically by the system.
CreateVolumeCluster.clusterName: Name of the CDS dedicated cluster to create.
CreateVolumeCluster.clusterSizeInGB: Total cluster capacity in GB; minimum 85 TB, maximum 1015 TB, in increments of 10 TB.
CreateVolumeCluster.storageType: CDS disk storage type: enhanced_ssd_pl0, enhanced_ssd_pl1, enhanced_ssd_pl2, enhanced_ssd_pl3 (Enhanced SSD tiers); cloud_hp1 or premium_ssd (General SSD); hp1 or ssd (High-performance cloud disk); elastic_ephemeral_disk (Elastic ephemeral disk, standard). Default: hp1.
CreateVolumeCluster.purchaseCount: Number of CDS dedicated clusters to create; must be a positive integer greater than 0. Default: 1.
CreateVolumeCluster.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or Bidding (spot instance).
CreateVolumeCluster.billing.reservation: Reservation details; required for Prepaid, not needed for Postpaid.
CreateVolumeCluster.tags: List of tags to attach to the created resource.
